_comment: Residential driveway camera for resident/visitor tracking via plate OCR. LPR allowlist holds the resident plates (Korean format: NN가NNNN or NNN가NNNN). Whitespace variations are normalized on load, so entries can be loose. Flip hash_plates:true to store SHA-256 prefixes instead of raw text for PII-light analytics. Plate reads fire once per tracked vehicle at tripwire crossing — position the tripwire where the vehicle's plate is large and well-lit.
